sections.name: Ryta

link.alt: Pathfinder #164: Hands of the Devil pg. 36
link.name: Pathfinder #164: Hands of the Devil pg. 36

sections.text: *Nethys Note: No description has been provided for this NPC.*

link.alt: Pathfinder #164: Hands of the Devil pg. 36
link.name: Pathfinder #164: Hands of the Devil pg. 36

traits.name: Unique
traits.text: A rules element with this trait is one-of-a-kind. The DC of Recall Knowledge checks related to creatures with this trait is increased by 10.

traits.name: Lawful
traits.text: Lawful effects often manipulate energy from law-aligned Outer Planes and are antithetical to chaotic divine servants or divine servants of chaotic deities. A creature with this trait is lawful in alignment.

traits.name: Humanoid
traits.text: Humanoid creatures reason and act much like humans. They typically stand upright and have two arms and two legs.

traits.name: Ratfolk
traits.text: A creature with this trait is a member of the ratfolk ancestry. Ratfolk are humanoids who resemble rats. An ability with this trait can be used or selected only by ratfolk.

automatic_abilities.effect: Ryta Steps and gains a +2 circumstance bonus to AC against the triggering attack.
automatic_abilities.name: Dance Moves
automatic_abilities.trigger: Ryta is targeted with a melee or ranged attack by an attacker she can see

traits.name: Agile
traits.text: The multiple attack penalty you take with this weapon on the second attack on your turn is –4 instead of –5, and –8 instead of –10 on the third and subsequent attacks in the turn.

traits.name: Finesse
traits.text: You can use your Dexterity modifier instead of your Strength modifier on attack rolls using this melee weapon. You still use your Strength modifier when calculating damage.

ability.name: Cheek Pouches
ability.text: Ryta has stretchy cheek pouches that can store up to 1 cubic foot of objects (though no more than four light items). She can remove or store an item using the Interact action. As long as she has at least one object in her cheek pouches, her speech is noticeably difficult to understand.

ability.name: Swarming
ability.text: Ryta can end her movement in the same square as an ally that also has this ability. Only two such creatures can share the same space.

ability.name: Vocal Warm-Up
ability.text: Ryta sets up devastating vibrations that echo in her throat and her cheek pouches. Until the start of her next turn, her fangs Strikes deal an additional 2d8 sonic damage. Ryta can't use Vocal Warm-up if she has an object in her cheek pouches.

universal_monster_ability.name: Darkvision
universal_monster_ability.text: A monster with darkvision can see perfectly well in areas of darkness and dim light, though such vision is in black and white only. Some forms of magical darkness, such as a 4th-level *darkness* spell, block normal darkvision. A monster with greater darkvision, however, can see through even these forms of magical darkness.

link.alt: Pathfinder #164: Hands of the Devil pg. 36
link.name: Pathfinder #164: Hands of the Devil pg. 36
